name: LGF Bookings
upgrade_notice: IN product key: use room_code + room_name (e.g. '01 - Anemone'). IN line items: include notes from product.

sections.description: WordPress-native bookings CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.9.2.01: Invoice Ninja product key now uses 'room_code - room_name' (e.g. '01 - Anemone'). Line items include the product's notes field as the description.
  • 1.9.2: Removed IN product mapping from room settings — product lookup uses room name directly.
